title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Snap On Tools Ltd
body: "Application number 4976  Applicant Snap-on Incorporated objected to the name used by Snap On Tools Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 6 March 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Snap On Tools Ltd is changed to 15548659, LTD. "
